briefing.title: Art Market 2026 Outlook
briefing.summary: U.S. art market saw a 23% rebound in 2025 with $3.17B in auction sales, signaling a shift toward quality and provenance over speculation. Global art market grew 4% to $59.6B. Looking ahead to 2026, cautious optimism prevails amidst structural changes, with high-income spending and lower interest rates supporting the market, despite ongoing concerns about dealer profitability and geopolitical instability.
